assertions.assertion: Smart contract event analysis must filter for economically significant deployments and interactions

do: Focus on contracts with >$100K initial liquidity
Track verified contracts with significant transaction volume
Monitor contracts deployed by known protocols or teams
Prioritize contracts with unique or innovative functionality
dont: Report every contract deployment without significance filter
Track obvious scam contracts or honeypots
Include contracts with zero or minimal economic activity
List deployments without analyzing their purpose or impact

assertions.commentary: Thousands of contracts deploy daily. Meaningful analysis requires filtering for economic significance, verified sources, and genuine innovation rather than cataloging noise.

assertions.assertion: Governance event analysis must connect proposals to potential market impact and token price catalysts

do: Track governance proposals affecting token emissions or buybacks
Monitor proposals changing protocol revenue distribution
Identify votes on major protocol upgrades or parameter changes
Connect governance outcomes to potential price catalysts
dont: List governance proposals without analyzing economic impact
Ignore voting participation rates and outcome certainty
Fail to distinguish routine proposals from significant changes
Report governance activity without market implication analysis

assertions.commentary: Governance matters when it affects tokenomics or protocol economics. Analysis must filter for proposals with clear market impact potential, not merely catalog all governance activity.

assertions.assertion: Token launch analysis must evaluate launch mechanics, liquidity depth, and team credibility

do: Analyze liquidity lock duration and depth
Verify team identity and track record
Assess token distribution fairness (no massive pre-mine)
Evaluate contract security (audit status, verified code)
dont: Promote unverified tokens without due diligence warnings
Ignore liquidity lock status and rug pull risks
Report launches without analyzing tokenomics sustainability
Fail to distinguish legitimate projects from obvious scams

assertions.commentary: New token launches carry extreme risk. Professional analysis requires rigorous evaluation of launch mechanics, team credibility, and security fundamentals before any consideration.

assertions.assertion: Liquidity events must be analyzed for market depth impact and potential price volatility

do: Calculate liquidity additions/removals as percentage of total pool
Identify concentrated liquidity range changes in Uniswap v3
Track major LP position exits that could signal top/bottom
Analyze liquidity distribution across DEX aggregators
dont: Report liquidity changes without percentage impact context
Ignore concentrated vs. full-range liquidity differences
Miss correlation between LP exits and price turning points
Fail to analyze cross-DEX liquidity fragmentation

assertions.commentary: Liquidity is the foundation of price discovery. Significant liquidity events can dramatically impact slippage and volatility, making them critical signals for trading strategy adjustments.
